title: run — one retrieval execution
description: The provenance of coverage: when retrieval ran, with which config, over what window, what it matched, what it landed, and what it skipped as already known (OVERVIEW rule 1). Written by tools/fetch_pubmed.py, one per invocation; every article points back via run_id.

config.description: The retrieval_config this run executed (referential integrity in validate.py).

matched.description: Raw query matches in the window, before dedup.

added.description: The article records this run landed, in run order.

skipped_pmids.description: PMIDs already in the record — one record per PMID, ever.
